title: Happy Birthday Candles 18" Square Foil Balloon Party Decoration, Suitable for Helium or Air
features: Festive Design: This 18" square foil balloon features a vibrant blue background with colourful confetti and five cheerful candle characters in contrasting colours.
Versatile: Suitable for inflating with helium or air, making it a flexible decoration for birthdays, parties, or any celebratory occasion.
Durable Material: Constructed from mylar quality foil, ensuring the balloon retains its shape and vivid design.
Easy to Display: Once inflated, the square shape allows for effortless display on walls, tables, or as part of a balloon bouquet.
Memorable Keepsake: This delightful balloon can serve as a cherished memento for the birthday celebrant.
description: Product description Celebrate a special occasion with this vibrant 'Happy Birthday' square foil balloon! Measuring 46 cm across, this birthday balloon features a bright blue background adorned with cheerful candle characters in various colours and patterns. The bold lettering and playful design make it a delightful addition to any birthday party decor. Suitable for inflating with either helium or air, this 18" square foil balloon is sure to bring smiles and create lasting memories. Liven up your celebrations with this eye-catching party decoration. Safety Warning WARNING! Children under eight years can choke or suffocate on uninflated or broken balloons. Adult supervision required. Keep uninflated balloons from children. Discard broken balloons at once. Made of natural rubber latex, which may cause allergies. Use a pump to blow up the balloon! Please retain this information for future reference. WARNING! Not suitable for children under 36 months due to potential small parts which may pose a choking hazard. Adult supervision required. You are advised to keep this for future reference. Do not inhale helium or balloon gas as this may result in unconsciousness and can cause death due to lack of oxygen.
